examples: They believed they were participating in an insurance scam, not a murder.
What first put the police onto the scam?
Her family is ungrateful and spiteful. When Maggie buys them a house, her mother flies off the handle, worried that her welfare scam will be ruined.
His scam was easy enough for me to figure out, but no one was stopping him.
In some ways the aftermath of the Madoff scam is much like the Ponzi scheme itself.
